self.name: Bills Update and certify mover scenario

object.name: Bills Update and certify mover scenario
object.description: Workflow to update a user's access during a mover scenario, such as when a user changes departments or teams.

Compare Strings.description:
Determines whether the identity's department attribute was updated to Sales. If so, the workflow proceeds. Otherwise, the workflow ends.

NOTE: This template makes an assumption in later actions/nodes about the identity's former department. You could use an additional operator with branching steps for different departments for more flexibility.

Create Certification Campaign.description: Creates a certification campaign so that the identity's new manager can review their access, to ensure they have the access they need and don't have access they don't need.

Get Access.description:
Gets all roles with "Product Role" in their name.

In this example, the identity needs to retain this access despite their department move. If the access gets removed because they no longer meet the role criteria, it must be put back by this workflow. This step retrieves the access for the Manage Access step to add.

Get Identity.description: Retrieves available details about the identity.

Get Identity 1.description: This node is used to gather information about the user's manager to populate their email in "Recipient"

attributes.comments: Automatically requested as transitory access by workflows

Manage Access.description: Adds the access from the Get Access step to the identity.

attributes.body:
Attention,

User ${name} has recently changed departments


Thank you,
Your Access Team
attributes.subject: Department Change

Send Email.description: Sends an email to the identity's manager. Configure details about this email below.

Wait.description: Pauses to wait for all other provisioning activities to complete, such as automated role or access profile removals.

success.description: Ends the workflow and marks it as a success.
